steps.title: Use vertex form
steps.content:
A quadratic with vertex $(5,-4)$ can be written as
$$
f(x)=A(x-5)^2-4
$$
Use the point $(4,-6)$ to find $A$:
$$
-6=A(4-5)^2-4
$$
so $A=-2$.

steps.title: Compare the intercepts
steps.content: The graph of $y=5\cdot f(x)$ has $y$-intercept $$ b=5f(0)=5(-54)=-270 $$ The positive difference is $$ |-270-(-54)|=216 $$ The answer is 216.
